scope_note: Bell CHSH Cert: certifies the 8|N theorem — the QA cosine correlator E_N(s,t)=cos(2pi(s-t)/N) achieves CHSH Tsirelson bound |S|=2sqrt(2) iff 8|N. Verified by exhaustive settings search. The model is a valid deterministic LHV (model_not_physically_realizable=False), contrasting with the retracted I3322 implementation which used unconstrained quantum correlators.
